arguments.Description: "Change map navigation URL format to use exact coordinates destination scheme for direct directions/routing instead of search query"
arguments.Instruction: "Modify the 'harita' key to construct a direct routing URL using google maps API v1 with exact latitude and longitude destination coordinates."
arguments.ReplacementContent:
"              mosques.add({
                'ad': name.toString(),
                'adres': address.isNotEmpty ? address : 'Konum: ${mLat.toStringAsFixed(4)}, ${mLon.toStringAsFixed(4)}',
                'harita': 'https://www.google.com/maps/dir/?api=1&destination=$mLat,$mLon',
                'lat': mLat,
                'lon': mLon,
                'mesafeVal': dist,
                'mesafeText': dist < 1
                    ? '${(dist * 1000).toInt()} m'
                    : '${dist.toStringAsFixed(1)} km',
              });"
arguments.TargetContent:
"              mosques.add({
                'ad': name.toString(),
                'adres': address.isNotEmpty ? address : 'Konum: ${mLat.toStringAsFixed(4)}, ${mLon.toStringAsFixed(4)}',
                'harita': 'https://maps.google.com/?q=$mLat,$mLon&query=$encodedName',
                'lat': mLat,
                'lon': mLon,
                'mesafeVal': dist,
                'mesafeText': dist < 1
                    ? '${(dist * 1000).toInt()} m'
                    : '${dist.toStringAsFixed(1)} km',
              });"
